name: A-Sonic Aerospace Limited
summary: A-Sonic Aerospace Limited, an investment holding company, operates in the aviation and logistics businesses in Asia, North America, Sub-Continent India, and Europe. It operates in two segments, Aviation and Logistics. The Aviation segment supplies aircraft systems and components to airlines and aviation maintenance repair organizations; and customized aircraft maintenance management solutions to airlines, as well as purchases, upgrades/retrofits, sells, or leases aircraft. The Logistics segment provides supply chain management services, such as international and domestic multi-modal transportation, warehousing, distribution, and customs clearance; and airport ground services for cargo and transportation services, as well as specialized active and passive packaging solutions. It is also involved in the air cargo general sales agency activities for various international airlines. The company also provides freight forwarding services. A-Sonic Aerospace Limited was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Singapore.
